message.content:
{
  "analysis": "The terminal is polluted because commands were sent while a polling loop was active. The slow char-ngram training (PID 4251) is still running with ETA ~80 minutes, and later cleanup/autotune commands were concatenated/queued rather than executed cleanly. I need to regain a clean prompt first, kill all fastText processes, clean artifacts, then start a clean autotune job without manually fixed hyperparameters. The previous autotune failed to produce a model in part because `-loss softmax` was manually set; this time I will leave hyperparameters free except for autotune constraints. The final model must be saved as `/app/model.bin`, be <150MB, and achieve >=0.62 accuracy on the private test distribution. I will verify local accuracy and size before copying.",
  "plan": "1. Send Ctrl+C as a standalone keystroke and wait briefly for a clean prompt.
2. Run a combined recovery command: kill any fastText supervised processes via /proc scan, verify none remain, clean up all model/training artifacts except prepared data, verify split file counts, start a clean background autotune job with f1 metric, 900s duration, 140MB size constraint, and no fixed loss/hyperparameters.
3. Poll for a bounded period to confirm autotune started and monitor progress.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "C-c
",
      "duration": 2.0
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "echo '--- clean restart ---'
for p in /proc/[0-9]*; do
  cmd=$(tr '\0' ' ' < "$p/cmdline" 2>/dev/null)
  case "$cmd" in
    *fasttext*supervised*) echo "killing ${p##*/}: $cmd"; kill -KILL "${p##*/}" 2>/dev/null || true;;
  esac
done
sleep 3
grep -l 'fasttext' /proc/*/comm 2>/dev/null | head -5 || echo 'no fasttext procs'
rm -f /app/work/model_char.bin /app/work/model_char.vec /app/work/model_char.ftz /app/work/train_char.log /app/work/train_char.pid /app/work/model_aut.bin /app/work/model_aut.vec /app/work/model_aut.ftz /app/work/autotune.log /app/work/autotune.pid /app/work/model_aut2.bin /app/work/model_aut2.vec /app/work/model_aut2.ftz /app/work/autotune2.log /app/work/autotune2.pid
wc -l /app/work/train_aut.txt /app/work/val_aut.txt /app/work/train.txt /app/work/test.txt
nohup /opt/fastText/fasttext supervised -input /app/work/train_aut.txt -output /app/work/model_aut2 -autotune-validation /app/work/val_aut.txt -autotune-metric f1 -autotune-duration 900 -autotune-modelsize 140000000 -thread $(nproc) > /app/work/autotune2.log 2>&1 &
echo $! > /app/work/autotune2.pid
",
      "duration": 8.0
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "for i in $(seq 1 10); do
  pid=$(cat /app/work/autotune2.pid 2>/dev/null || true)
  if [ -n "$pid" ] && [ -d "/proc/$pid" ]; then status=running; else status=finished; fi
  size=$(stat -c %s /app/work/model_aut2.bin 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  printf 'iter=%s status=%s bin_size=%s ' "$i" "$status" "$size"
  tail -1 /app/work/autotune2.log 2>/dev/null || true
  if [ "$status" = finished ] && [ "$size" -gt 0 ]; then echo 'autotune2_done_break'; break; fi
  sleep 30
done
",
      "duration": 330.0
    }
  ]
}
